title: Erythranthe montioides
taxonomy: Erythranthe montioides is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It belongs to the genus Erythranthe, which is a group of plants commonly known as monkey flowers. The species Erythranthe montioides is native to the western United States. Its classification also places it within the order Lamiales and the class Magnoliopsida. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other plants.
uses: Erythranthe montioides, also known as the sticky monkey flower, has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits. The plant contains compounds that have been shown to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
